name: obnicode
description: Configure Explorer view actions, startup background tasks, and document formatters via VS Code settings.

obnicode.explorerViewActions.markdownDescription: Shell actions shown in the Explorer view right-click command picker.

name.description: Display name shown in the VS Code Quick Pick.

description.description: Optional short description shown next to the action name.

command.description: Shell command executed for this action. Supports template variables such as ${path}, ${workspaceFolder}, and ${selectedType}.

cwd.description: Working directory for the command. Defaults to ${rawWorkspaceFolder}.

match.description: Optional JavaScript regular expression. The action is only shown when every selected path matches. Example: ^src/.*\.ts$

terminalName.description: Optional integrated terminal name when useTerminal is true. Defaults to the action name.

useTerminal.description: Run the command in a VS Code integrated terminal instead of the output channel.

obnicode.backgroundTasks.markdownDescription: Workspace startup tasks launched when the extension activates.

name.description: Display name used in background task logs.

command.description: Shell command launched when the extension activates. Supports template variables such as ${rawWorkspaceFolder}.

cwd.description: Working directory for the command. Defaults to ${rawWorkspaceFolder}.

outputChannel.description: VS Code output channel name for stdout/stderr. Required unless useTerminal is true.

terminalName.description: Optional integrated terminal name when useTerminal is true. Defaults to the task name.

useTerminal.description: Run the command in a VS Code integrated terminal instead of the configured output channel.

obnicode.formatters.markdownDescription: Document formatters. The command receives the document content on stdin and must write the formatted content to stdout.

language.description: VS Code language id handled by this formatter, such as typescript, json, or python.

languages.description: VS Code language ids handled by this formatter.

command.description: Shell command used as a formatter. Receives the document content on stdin and must print the formatted content to stdout.

cwd.description: Working directory for the formatter command. Defaults to ${rawWorkspaceFolder}.

match.description: Optional JavaScript regular expression tested against the workspace-relative path. Example: ^src/.*\.ts$

obnicode.systemStatus.enabled.description: Show system usage information in the VS Code status bar.

obnicode.systemStatus.showCpu.description: Show CPU usage in the status bar and tooltip.

obnicode.systemStatus.showFrequency.description: Show CPU frequency in the status bar and tooltip.

obnicode.systemStatus.showMemory.description: Show RAM usage in the status bar and tooltip.

obnicode.systemStatus.showDisk.description: Show storage usage in the status bar and tooltip.

obnicode.systemStatus.updateIntervalMs.description: Refresh interval in milliseconds for the system status bar item.

obnicode.systemStatus.diskPath.description: Path used to determine storage usage. Defaults to the first workspace folder, or the user home directory when no workspace is open.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run validate:json
scripts.build:vsix: npm run check && npm run compile && vsce package
